title: PhotoQuilt: Training-Free Arbitrary-Resolution Photomosaics via Bootstrapped Tiled Denoising
innovation_summary: PhotoQuilt: Training-Free Arbitrary-Resolution Photomosaics via Bootstrapped Tiled Denoising: We present PhotoQuilt, a training-free framework that generates photomosaics at arbitrary resolution.
